title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.29 — VU SCALE MOVED DOWN, RED HEADROOM ABOVE 0 dB (user ref: classic Hoyt VU face). The scale ran -50..+3 dBFS, which parked 0 dBFS at 94pct of the sweep — effectively nowhere to show over. Like a real VU, 0 now sits at 80pct with red above it. New range -40..+10 dBFS: 0 dB lands at exactly 80pct, the red over-zone owns the top 20pct, and the WATTS decades fall on even 20pct steps (.01@-40, .1@-30, 1@-20, 10@-10, 100@0 dBFS; .001 dropped as it fell off the new low end). RED ZONE drawn as a thick band on BOTH arcs from 0 dB to +10, with the +5/+10 ticks and labels in red. Needle + printed marks still share one dbToDeg(), so they cannot drift. Readings stay dBFS true-peak matching the METERING bars (v0.4.28). VERIFY IN ABLETON: 0 dB should sit ~80pct across with a clear red band above; watt marks evenly spaced a decade per 10 dB; needle into the red only when the output is genuinely over 0 dBFS. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork; deferred patina surfaces.
